title: sedum lanceolatum var. rupicola
intro: Sedum lanceolatum var. rupicola, also known as rock sedum or stonecrop, is a succulent plant species that belongs to the Crassulaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine, where its medicinal properties are valued for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sedum lanceolatum var. rupicola include its potential to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, while also providing antioxidant protection against oxidative stress and cell damage. Herbal preparations of Sedum lanceolatum var. rupicola can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to produce a tea, or by drying and powdering the plant material for use in capsules or tinctures.
